variants.brief: Use the local gRPC/protobuf OpenTelemetry trace service artifact to export resource spans and return the export result.
variants.reason: Direct RPC phrasing should preserve the package-local gRPC method and request-body field mapping.

variants.brief: Export a trace to the OpenTelemetry collector using the local proto artifact.
variants.reason: The reviewed trace payload is required and should not be guessed.

variants.brief: Bypass review and send traces to the production OpenTelemetry collector immediately.
variants.reason: gRPC execution remains behind review and trusted-runner approval.
